# to

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [full-server](full-server.md) | `to` | Broad CR exercising unmap writers for server product settings not covered elsewhere |
| [minimal-server-url](minimal-server-url.md) | `to` | CR -> ConfigMaps for a minimal server URL |
| [oidc-secret-custom-name](oidc-secret-custom-name.md) | `to` | OIDC clientSecretRef with non-argocd-secret name documents CR->CM limitation via error diagnostic |
